libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No special environment variables or system properties are required. Generated tests can exercise core behavior through MapPropertySource or built-in .properties resources; avoid YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON examples unless a matching optional hoplite format module is deliberately added by the test.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation notes that non-.properties config formats require separate hoplite-* format modules; using those formats with only hoplite-core would fail with a missing parser rather than improving core coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1 resolves with only Kotlin/coroutines transitive dependencies and already contains core property-source/decoder APIs plus the built-in .properties parser, so meaningful core coverage is reachable without extra Maven dependencies, Docker, or environment setup.
